body:
Priya, great catching up at the Aspen summit last week — I've been thinking more about what you mentioned regarding [Lumen Grid](companies/lumen-grid) and wanted to share where we landed internally. We're moving forward with a $4M seed check, which puts us at roughly 18% on a post-money basis, and I wanted to give you a heads-up before anything gets formalized in case Sequoia wants to participate in the round. The founders are targeting a close by September 12th, so the timeline is tighter than I initially expected when we first chatted. Let me know if it makes sense to set up a quick call with [Nadia Osei](people/nadia-osei) on their side — she's been the one driving the cap table conversations directly. Happy to make the intro if you're interested.

Amara
